description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden cargo bed with vertical side panels reinforced by metal brackets and bolts. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels with metal rims, positioned on either side near the rear. The front of the cart extends into two long, parallel wooden handles designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform consists of wooden planks arranged with slight gaps between them, giving it an open slat appearance. The wood is weathered, with a natural brown tone, and the metal fittings are a dull gray, suggesting utilitarian durability. The interior is open and unobstructed, suitable for carrying various goods or materials in an urban environment.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with metal-reinforced sides, two large spoked wheels, and long wooden handles for manual transport. The open slat platform and sturdy build make it ideal for carrying loads.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, both wheels, and the long wooden handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open cargo area, the width of the cart, and the side panels with metal reinforcements.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the wheels, handles, and side construction.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open end of the cart, the parallel handles, and the slatted load platform.
